metadata.description: Personal development plugins for library book management, generative art, physics, mathematics, fitness, learning, goals, NVC, AI, and more

plugins.name: booklife
plugins.description: Reading life management powered by BookLife MCP - track books, manage library loans, sync reading status across Hardcover and Libby

plugins.name: llm-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for LLM training, fine-tuning, and experimentation with GPT and Mamba architectures

plugins.name: math-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for symbolic algebra and GPU-accelerated numerical computing with SymPy, NumPy, and optional CuPy

plugins.name: math-physics-ml
plugins.description: GPU-accelerated MCP system for computational mathematics, quantum physics simulations, molecular dynamics, and neural network training

plugins.name: molecular-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for classical molecular dynamics simulations with GPU acceleration

plugins.name: neural-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for neural network training and experimentation with PyTorch

plugins.name: quantum-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for wave mechanics and Schrodinger equation simulations with GPU acceleration

plugins.name: superpredictor-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for probabilistic forecasting with Bayesian updates, Fermi estimation, prediction markets, and calibration tracking
